Rebuilding for Service

NJ Licensed Contractor.
Professional Remodeling.

Tillerstead LLC is a New Jersey Home Improvement Contractor (HIC# 13VH10808800) focused on contract remodeling scopes: bathrooms, flooring, kitchen backsplash, selective demolition, and finish installs. Quality workmanship. Transparent pricing. Accountable execution.
Get Free Estimate View Services
NJ HIC# 13VH10808800

Contract Remodeling Services

From bathrooms and flooring to backsplash and interior prep work, Tillerstead delivers contract remodeling scopes with clear communication, defined sequencing, and accountable execution. Every project built to NJ building code standards.

Bathroom Remodeling

Full bathroom updates: substrate prep, waterproofing, tile installation, fixture setting, and finish trim. Built to TCNA and NJ plumbing code standards.
Learn more

Flooring Installation

Professional tile, LVP, and engineered wood flooring installs. Substrate correction, moisture testing, and precision layout for long-lasting results.
Learn more

Kitchen Backsplash

Custom tile backsplash installation with proper substrate prep, waterproof sealing, and clean finish details around outlets and cabinets.
Learn more

Selective Demo & Prep

Controlled demolition, substrate correction, moisture prep, and jobsite protection before finish installation. Clean, safe, and code-compliant.
Learn more

Finish Installation

Bathroom finish packages, flooring installs, kitchen backsplash systems, trim and close-out detail work. Professional results, every time.
Learn more

Free Estimates

Detailed project assessments, scope documentation, and transparent cost estimates. No-pressure consultations for NJ homeowners.
Learn more
NJ HIC# 13VH10808800

Rebuilding for Service

Tillerstead LLC was founded on a simple principle: quality home improvement should be accessible, transparent, and built to last.

As a New Jersey licensed Home Improvement Contractor, we're rebuilding our business to serve homeowners with contract remodeling scopes focused on bathrooms, flooring, backsplash, and finish installation. Every project built to NJ building code standards with permitted, inspected work.

Licensed & Insured
Permitted Work
Code Compliant

What We Build

  • Bathroom Remodels: Substrate prep, waterproofing, tile, fixtures
  • Flooring Installation: Tile, LVP, engineered wood with moisture testing
  • Kitchen Backsplash: Custom tile work with proper sealing
  • Selective Demo: Controlled demolition, substrate correction
  • Finish Installation: Trim, detail work, professional close-out

Why Choose Tillerstead?

We combine disciplined project sequencing, transparent scope control, and clean finish standards to deliver dependable remodeling outcomes for New Jersey homeowners.

NJ Licensed & Insured

Registered New Jersey Home Improvement Contractor (HIC# 13VH10808800) with comprehensive liability insurance. All work permitted and inspected to meet NJ building code requirements.

Defined Scope & Sequencing

Clear work phases, documented change orders, and measurable completion criteria from selective demo through final finish install. No surprises, no scope creep.

Transparent, Line-Item Pricing

Detailed proposals broken down by scope phase. Know exactly what bathroom, flooring, and backsplash work costs before any demo begins.

Contractor Resources & Guides

Step-by-step guides built around real interior contracting scopes and professional install workflows.

Ready to Start Your Remodel?

Get scope planning for bathroom, flooring, backsplash, and interior installation projects.
Request Free Estimate
